assertions.name: json_valid
assertions.description: Output is valid JSON that can be parsed

assertions.name: three_floors_generated
assertions.description: Three map files generated: floor_01.json, floor_02.json, floor_03.json

assertions.name: correct_dimensions
assertions.description: All maps have correct dimensions (25x19 tiles)

assertions.name: valid_stairs_floor1
assertions.description: Floor 1 has only STAIRS_DOWN (tile 20), no STAIRS_UP

assertions.name: valid_stairs_floor2_3
assertions.description: Floors 2-3 have both STAIRS_UP and STAIRS_DOWN

assertions.name: entities_on_floor_tiles
assertions.description: All entities are placed on floor tiles (type 1), not walls

assertions.name: doors_not_bypassable
assertions.description: All doors have walls on adjacent tiles (not floor tiles)

assertions.name: connectivity
assertions.description: All floor tiles are reachable from player_start

assertions.name: key_before_door
assertions.description: Keys are placed before their corresponding doors in exploration order
